records.name: Apple ARKit and TrueDepth teacher outputs
records.license: Apple SDK and platform terms; independent output-use review required
records.personal_biometric_consent_basis: Separate participant consent is required in addition to SDK terms.
prohibited_uses: Training, distillation, or pseudo-labeling before written terms review
records.evidence: No commercial teacher-output permission has been approved in this registry.

records.name: CREMA-D
attribution_obligations: Preserve required database and contents attribution
share_alike_obligations: Review ODbL produced-work and adapted-database obligations before release
records.personal_biometric_consent_basis: Original dataset consent and downstream biometric/model use require legal review.
prohibited_uses: Production training or release before legal approval
records.evidence: The official repository identifies ODbL/DbCL; commercial model-training and release obligations remain unapproved.

records.name: ICT Face Model Light
records.license: No commercial Light license approved; official page directs commercial users to contact USC ICT
records.personal_biometric_consent_basis: Source model provenance is described by USC ICT; downstream commercial rights remain unapproved.
prohibited_uses: Commercial synthetic generation or training before written permission
records.evidence: The official page lists Light/Full features but does not provide an approved commercial Light grant.

records.name: NanaTracking generated smoke fixtures
records.personal_biometric_consent_basis: No people or biometric recordings are present.
prohibited_uses: Production-quality, real-data, demographic, or target-device acceptance claims
records.evidence: Repository-owned generated arrays and tiny fixtures only.

records.name: NanaTracking consented first-party capture program
records.personal_biometric_consent_basis: Each de-identified identity requires a signed consent record and withdrawal mapping.
prohibited_uses: Use after withdrawal or retention expiry
records.evidence: Registry entry is a deny-by-default template until reviewed consent batches are separately approved.
